nemoclaw-sandbox.name: NemoClaw Sandbox Factory
nemoclaw-sandbox.description: OpenShell sandbox lifecycle management — create/destroy/query policy-governed sandboxes per RBAC role
nemoclaw-sandbox._security_note: Internal Docker network only — never exposed through Traefik directly. Agent-service proxies requests with X-Auth-Request-Groups header.

shml-platform.name: SHML Platform MCP
shml-platform.description: Training status, GPU info, MLflow queries, Vision analysis

obsidian-vault.name: Obsidian Knowledge Vault
obsidian-vault.description: Read/write/search the platform knowledge vault (decisions, experiments, models)

filesystem-DISABLED._SECURITY_NOTE: DISABLED - grants read/write access to entire platform directory including secrets/. Replaced by per-sandbox blueprint MCP servers (blueprint-developer.yaml → sandbox-filesystem, blueprint-elevated.yaml → platform-code-readonly). NemoClaw Landlock policy enforces the path constraints at kernel level.
filesystem-DISABLED.name: File System (DISABLED — use NemoClaw blueprint MCP)
filesystem-DISABLED.description: SECURITY: Disabled. Safe replacement: blueprint-based sandbox-filesystem MCP (scoped to /sandbox via Landlock). See nemoclaw-blueprint/blueprint-*.yaml.

brave-search.name: Brave Search
brave-search.description: Web search via Brave Search API

gitlab.name: GitLab CE
gitlab.description: GitLab project management — issues, MRs, pipelines, file ops, code search. Self-hosted CE at /gitlab/. Project ID: 2.

prometheus.name: Prometheus Metrics
prometheus.description: Read-only PromQL queries against global-prometheus (172.30.0.23:9090). 11 tools: query, range_query, label ops, metric names, series, alerts, rules, targets.

nemoclaw._note: NemoClaw is alpha software. fallbackToDockerSandbox=true ensures availability during upgrades.

notes: SHML Platform MCP integrates with Ray training and MLflow
Vision tools (RTX 2070) are always safe during training
Code gen tools (RTX 3090 Ti) are blocked during training
Use 'training_status' tool to check before heavy operations
